scope.doesNotApplyTo: All other Chapter 1 topics (ch01-t01, ch01-t04, ch01-t05, ch01-t06, ch01-t07, ch01-t09, ch01-t11, ch01-t12, ch01-t13, ch01-t14) remain under their prior rights status. This policy does not extend to them without a separate, explicit decision.

legalDisclaimer: This is a project content policy governing how canonical pilot content will be authored for the four listed topics. It is not a declaration of legal ownership of any source material, and it is not external legal rights clearance. It resolves the project's internal rightsPending blocker by committing to an original-content-only authoring approach, not by asserting that clearance for any underlying publisher material was obtained.
policyStatements: All student-facing explanations must be newly authored.
No textbook, review-card, problem-bank, slide, or Kahoot wording may be copied or closely paraphrased.
No publisher visual may be traced, replicated, cropped, or reused.
All pilot diagrams must be newly designed from the underlying scientific facts.
Publisher-derived problems and review-card questions are excluded from the pilot.
Source IDs may remain as internal provenance and audit lineage only.
Missing Source-002 visuals are not required for the pilot and may be replaced by original diagrams or omitted.

excludedSources.SRC-CH01-CONV-005: Problems (P5) — confirmed Cengage-copyrighted end-of-chapter problems (verified via embedded PDF footer text during the earlier GitHub-setup review). Excluded entirely from pilot authoring for these four topics. Source IDs (e.g. S5-P001-P004, S5-P017/P018/P033, S5-P019-P022) may still appear in provenanceLinks/sourceRecordIds for internal traceability only, never as reused wording.
excludedSources.SRC-CH01-REVIEW-001: Review cards (R1) — suspected Cengage-derived 'Learning Check' textbook feature (the cards' own printed text describes itself as included 'at the end of most sections,' a book-wide recurring feature, not course-specific content). Excluded entirely from pilot authoring for these four topics on the same basis.

visualRequirement: Every visual actually used in the pilot for ch01-t02, ch01-t03, ch01-t08, or ch01-t10 must be newly designed from the underlying scientific facts and must pass scientific review before use. No slide (P3), textbook, review-card (R1), or Kahoot (K1) image may be traced, cropped, or reused. This requirement is preserved going forward regardless of any other blocker's resolution status.
rightsPendingResolutionRationale: rightsPending existed because it was unknown whether P3 slide graphics, R1 review-card questions, P5 problems, or Kahoot wording could be reused verbatim or near-verbatim in pilot content. This policy resolves that uncertainty by committing to author fully original explanations and diagrams for these four topics, referencing source IDs only as internal audit lineage. Because no disputed material will actually be copied or closely paraphrased under this policy, no external rights clearance is required to proceed with pilot generation for these four topics.
unverifiedVisualResolutionRationale: The Source 002 (C2) conversation's missing image attachments relevant to ch01-t02 (S2-SEG019, S2-SEG029, S2-SEG039) and ch01-t03 (S2-SEG019, S2-SEG049) were never recoverable in the first place (see VISUAL_RESOLUTION_PLAN.json, ch01-vis-004). This policy declares them unnecessary for the pilot specifically for these two topics: any visual need for ch01-t02/ch01-t03 will be met by an original, scientifically reviewed diagram instead, so there is nothing left to recover or clear for pilot purposes. ch01-vis-004 remains open and unresolved for the non-pilot topics it also covers (ch01-t01, ch01-t04, ch01-t05, ch01-t06, ch01-t07).
doesNotAuthorize: No canonical or pilot content is generated by this policy record itself
